title: rubus hirtus var. ovatus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. ovatus, also known as the thorny raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a variety of raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. ovatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make jams, syrups, and other products that leverage its medicinal and culinary properties.
